assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create an AssemblyAI account and use the official Python Quickstart to transcribe the hosted wildfire sample until transcript text is printed.

first_success.outcome: The Python SDK transcribes AssemblyAI's hosted wildfire sample.
first_success.observable_signal: The terminal prints transcript text beginning with Smoke from hundreds of wildfires...

route_selection.surface: AssemblyAI Quickstart through a first pre-recorded transcription
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Email or Google signup then Python SDK wildfire transcription
candidates.reason: Exact signup fields and verification states are not publicly enumerated after the first choice.

candidates.name: Playground transcription without writing code
candidates.reason: Different interaction surface from the documented SDK quickstart terminal.

required_path.action: Create an AssemblyAI account and open the dashboard.
required_path.observable_result: An API key is available in the dashboard.

required_path.action: Set ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY and run the wildfire transcription sample.
required_path.observable_result: Transcript text for the hosted sample is printed.

prerequisites.description: An API key from the dashboard is required.

external_gates.description: Google identity-provider authorization when choosing Google signup.

platform_outcomes.description: AssemblyAI returns the completed transcript for the sample audio.

excluded.item: Installing AssemblyAI MCP or coding-agent skill
excluded.reason: Optional agent tooling, not required for the SDK sample.

sources.title: Can I sign up for free?

uncertainties.question: What exact email fields, password rules, terms, verification actions, and Google consent states lead to the dashboard API key?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account signup walkthrough through first API key visibility.
